title: scaphyglottis dunstervillei
intro: Scaphyglottis dunstervillei, a species of orchid, is a rare and exotic plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine, particularly in Venezuela and other parts of South America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Scaphyglottis dunstervillei include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Scaphyglottis dunstervillei can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea or by using it in tinctures and salves to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
